headline: Metronome cofounder working on usage-based billing and AI-era monetization at Stripe
title: Cofounder, Metronome
location: Oakland / San Francisco Bay Area, US
confidenceNote: Public LinkedIn and event pages match Andrew Garvin as Metronome cofounder/COO, with Stripe and Metronome confirming the acquisition context.
bioMarkdown: Cofounder of Metronome, now part of Stripe, focused on monetization infrastructure for usage-based and AI-native businesses. Useful connection for founders and GTM leaders thinking through pricing, metering, billing, and revenue operations as AI products move beyond seat-based SaaS.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Andrew Garvin as Co-Founder at Metronome with Stripe experience.

primary.label: Metronome blog
primary.note: Metronome announces it is now part of Stripe and frames its work around monetization infrastructure.

primary.label: Stripe blog
primary.note: Stripe says it finalized its acquisition of Metronome, an industry leader in usage-based billing.

secondary.label: Simon-Kucher event page
secondary.note: Lists Andrew Garvin as COO and cofounder of Metronome for an AI-era revenue model roundtable.

secondary.label: Gathr LinkedIn post
secondary.note: Describes Andrew Garvin discussing agentic AI pricing as Metronome cofounder.

headline: Registered as Chief AI Officer at B Capital; public corroboration is weak
title: Chief AI Officer
confidenceNote: Could not independently confirm a B Capital Andrew Jackson or Chief AI Officer role. Official B Capital sources confirm a strong AI platform and AI leadership function, but identify another person as Head of AI.
bioMarkdown: Registration identifies Andrew as Chief AI Officer at B Capital in San Francisco. Treat as a tentative match for conversations around AI strategy inside venture firms, portfolio enablement, and AI adoption by growth-stage companies until identity is confirmed.

primary.label: B Capital homepage
primary.note: Official firm page describing B Capital as a global investment firm with technology, healthcare, and resilience tech focus.

primary.label: B Capital AGM AI announcement
primary.note: Official B Capital page describes AI-driven strategy, internal AI engineering, and portfolio support.

primary.label: B Capital team page for Head of AI
primary.note: Official team page confirms B Capital has a Head of AI role, but it does not verify Andrew Jackson.

secondary.label: B Capital LinkedIn company page
secondary.note: Company profile summarizes B Capital's global investment focus and assets under management.

headline: Head of GTM at Adaptive ML focused on reinforcement learning adoption and open-source ML communities
title: Head of GTM
confidenceNote: Multiple public sources match Andrew Jardine to Adaptive ML GTM leadership, Hugging Face background, and MLOps community work.
bioMarkdown: GTM leader at Adaptive ML helping enterprises adopt reinforcement learning and task-specific model optimization. Previously worked in open-source ML go-to-market at Hugging Face and is active in the MLOps community, making him a strong match for AI infrastructure, enterprise adoption, and model-evaluation conversations.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Andrew Jardine as Head of Sales at Adaptive ML and open-source ML advocate.

primary.label: LinkedIn post
primary.note: Shows Andrew sharing technical ML research content from an Adaptive ML and Hugging Face background.

secondary.label: ODSC speaker page
secondary.note: Lists Andrew as Head of GTM at Adaptive ML and describes his reinforcement learning and Hugging Face background.

secondary.label: Let's Talk AI podcast page
secondary.note: Podcast bio describes his Adaptive ML role, open-source ML advocacy, and MLOps community leadership.

secondary.label: Kili Technology webinar page
secondary.note: Speaker bio says Andrew drives customer engagement and adoption of reinforcement learning at Adaptive ML.

headline: AI and advanced analytics specialist at Walker Advertising focused on legal marketing performance
